name: AniBridge Downloader
overview: Download anime and series from multiple streaming sites directly within Jellyfin (English Sub/Dub only)
description: Search, browse, and download anime and series from multiple streaming sites (AniWorld, s.to, Anikoto, Anime Nexus) directly within Jellyfin. English Sub/Dub only — no German. Adding a new site is a single pluggable adapter class.

versions.changelog:
v2.0.1.0
- Fix: Anikoto "Failed to load series"/missing thumbnails — was calling a nonexistent endpoint from an unrelated project. Series metadata is now carried through from search/browse results.
- Fix: Anikoto search/episode parsing corrected against live API responses.
- Fix: Anikoto stream resolution — added a MegaplayExtractor to decode the real video URL from the embed page the API returns (it was not a direct stream URL).
- Change: Only Anikoto's "HD-*" server is offered as a download option for now — other servers resolve through embed hosts without a verified extractor yet.
- Fix: Episode filenames/duplicate-detection for flat-episode-list sites (Anikoto) now use the real episode number.

v2.0.0.0
- Renamed to AniBridge Downloader (previously AniWorld Downloader) to reflect multi-site support. This is a new plugin GUID — uninstall the old "AniWorld Downloader" plugin and reconfigure download paths after installing this one.
- Feature: Pluggable site architecture — adding a new streaming site is a single service class, no controller/config changes required.
- Feature: Added Anikoto (anikoto.net) support, English Sub and Dub, via a community-documented third-party API.
- Feature: Added Anime Nexus (anime.nexus) support as an experimental, disabled-by-default adapter (unverified — anime.nexus has no public API and blocks automated research tools).
- Change: English Sub/Dub only across every source. All German language options have been removed, including from AniWorld and s.to.
- Change: Replaced all emoji in the UI with lucide.dev icons.
- Change: Config UI reorganized into one section per site; German-only toggle and numeric language-fallback-order removed in favor of a single Sub/Dub fallback checkbox.
- Removed: The /Flag endpoint and per-language flag SVGs — languages are now shown as icons (captions = Sub, mic = Dub).
